case_title: NYREE KIKU GALLARDO-HOTCHKISS VS. WARBY PARKER RETAIL, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT WARBY PARKER RETAIL, INC.

COURT MAY CONSIDER AT CONTINUED HEARING, THE EFFECT, IF ANY, OF AN ATTORNEY PROCURED ALLEGED SETTLEMENT WHICH WAS OBTAINED BY COUNSEL AFTER THE COMMENCEMENT OF THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT ACTION. This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Nathaniel Lucey, counsel for Appellant/Defendant Warby Parker Retail, Inc testifies on behalf of Warby Parker Retail. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
No new evidence is produced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
